mapper.select: SELECT MATCHUP_ID, MY_TEAM_COMBO, OPP_TEAM_COMBO, BONUS_MULTIPLIER, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TEAM_MATCHUP_BONUS ORDER BY MY_TEAM_COMBO, OPP_TEAM_COMBO
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TEAM_MATCHUP_BONUS T USING (SELECT #{myTeamCombo} AS MY_TEAM_COMBO, #{oppTeamCombo} AS OPP_TEAM_COMBO, #{bonusMultiplier} AS BONUS_MULTIPLIER, #{description} AS DESCRIPTION FROM DUAL) S ON (T.MY_TEAM_COMBO = S.MY_TEAM_COMBO AND T.OPP_TEAM_COMBO = S.OPP_TEAM_COMBO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.BONUS_MULTIPLIER = S.BONUS_MULTIPLIER, T.DESCRIPTION = S.DESCRIPTION, T.UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MY_TEAM_COMBO, OPP_TEAM_COMBO, BONUS_MULTIPLIER, DESCRIPTION) VALUES (S.MY_TEAM_COMBO, S.OPP_TEAM_COMBO, S.BONUS_MULTIPLIER, S.DESCRIPTION)
mapper.update: UPDATE TEAM_MATCHUP_BONUS SET BONUS_MULTIPLIER = #{bonusMultiplier}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE MATCHUP_ID = #{matchupId}
